quantum_ml_engineer.label: Quantum Machine Learning Engineer
quantum_ml_engineer.how_to_prepare: Start with Qiskit textbook then IBM Quantum certifications then Quantum ML research papers

ai_agent_architect.label: AI Agent Systems Architect
ai_agent_architect.how_to_prepare: Master LangGraph CrewAI AutoGen then Build multi-agent production systems

synthetic_data_engineer.label: Synthetic Data Engineer
synthetic_data_engineer.demand_prediction: High due to data privacy regulations

spatial_computing_developer.label: Spatial Computing or XR Developer
spatial_computing_developer.demand_prediction: Growing with Apple Vision Pro and Meta Quest

edge_ai_engineer.label: Edge AI or TinyML Engineer
edge_ai_engineer.demand_prediction: Growing with IoT and mobile AI

software_engineer.ai_impact_by_2030: 40% of routine coding automated. Engineers become AI orchestrators.
software_engineer.survival_strategy: Learn AI tools deeply, focus on system design, become T-shaped

data_analyst.ai_impact_by_2030: 60% of current tasks automated by AI copilots. Pure dashboard builders at risk.
data_analyst.survival_strategy: Move to decision science, learn causal inference, become business-domain expert

gen_ai_developer.ai_impact_by_2030: Role evolves rapidly. Current RAG/prompt engineering becomes commodity.
gen_ai_developer.survival_strategy: Stay on bleeding edge, contribute to open source, specialize in one vertical

ai_engineer.ai_impact_by_2030: Core role remains but shifts to AGI alignment and multi-modal systems.
ai_engineer.survival_strategy: Deep research skills, multi-modal expertise, safety and alignment knowledge

ml_engineer.ai_impact_by_2030: AutoML handles simple models. Focus shifts to complex production systems.
ml_engineer.survival_strategy: Master MLOps, distributed systems, and edge deployment
